headline: Klarna Scales Card to 5 Million Users, Deepens H&M Partnership
summary: KLAR hits 5M card users and expands H&M partnership, signaling rising demand for flexible payments as its global footprint and usage continue to surge.

headline: PayPal takes Venmo global
summary: The peer-to-peer payment app will be available to users in 90 countries by integrating with PayPal accounts, the company said Monday.

raw.headline: PayPal takes Venmo global
raw.summary: The peer-to-peer payment app will be available to users in 90 countries by integrating with PayPal accounts, the company said Monday.

headline: Venmo Global Link To PayPal And What It Means For PYPL Valuation
summary: Venmo, owned by PayPal Holdings, is expanding its peer to peer payment functionality to connect users with PayPal accounts across 90 markets worldwide. This is the first time Venmo users will be able to send and receive money directly with hundreds of millions of PayPal users globally. The move aims to reduce payment app fragmentation and simplify cross border transfers inside PayPal’s consumer ecosystem. For investors watching NasdaqGS:PYPL, this global Venmo rollout comes as the shares...

headline: 200 Million More Friends on Venmo -- Send Money to PayPal Users Around the World
summary: Venmo today announced a major expansion that brings the app's peer-to-peer payment experience to a global audience for the first time. Through new connectivity with PayPal, Venmo users can now send and receive money with hundreds of millions of PayPal users across 90 markets, marking the largest expansion of Venmo's addressable market since the app's launch. Venmo users now have access to one of the world's largest peer-to-peer payment networks. This directly addresses a common frustration with

headline: Here’s How PayPal Holdings (PYPL) Compounds the Value Over the Long Term
summary: Marram Investment Management, an outsourced long-term investment solutions provider, released its fourth-quarter investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Portfolio returned +4.0% (net) in 2025 and a cumulative return of 609.7% since its inception. The year reflects a notable divergence between market prices and business performance, but the firm evaluates […]

headline: PayPal: Mr. Market Is Ignoring Just How Cheap It Is

headline: PayPal: The Great Algorithmic Mistake And The Valuation Paradox With A P/E Of 8
